name: The Bookeater Gyre
description: Rescue Book Eater and Hobbles from the depths of Heck.
lore: Book Eater was a brave kitty, bold and fearless.
He was defeated not by fang or claw, but by a garden plant
whose poison claimed him before anyone could act.
Years passed. The ache of missing him never faded.
His brother Hobbles, loyal to the end, ventured into
the depths of Heck to find him. Hobbles was brave,
but the depths are no place for a cat alone.
He too was lost to all.
Ginger would not have it. This would not stand.
She gathered her companions, her coven, and set forth
The Bookeater Gyre awaits. Bring them home.

hobbles.name: Hobbles
hobbles.description: A scraggly but determined cat, trapped on floor 5. He limps but his eyes burn with purpose.
dialog: Hobbles: Book Eater... he's deeper. I can feel him.
Hobbles: The Poisoned Garden... floor 8. That's where it took him.
Hobbles: I tried to reach him but... *limps* ...I couldn't make it alone.
Hobbles: Please. Bring my brother home.

bookeater.name: Book Eater
bookeater.description: A spectral cat, luminous and still. He sits among poisoned flowers, waiting.
dialog_before_hobbles: A faint shimmer... you see a cat sitting among dead flowers.
Book Eater: I've been here so long. The flowers... they never stop blooming.
Book Eater: Hobbles? Is Hobbles here? He came looking for me...
Book Eater: I won't leave without my brother.
dialog_with_hobbles: The two cats nuzzle. The poisoned flowers begin to wilt.
Book Eater: ...we can go? We can really go?
Book Eater: Ginger sent you. Of course she did.
The spectral glow fades. Book Eater is warm again.

ginger.name: Ginger
ginger.description: The quest giver. She stands at the overworld town, resolute.
dialog_start: Ginger: They're down there. Both of them.
Ginger: Book Eater... he was taken by poison. A garden plant.
Ginger: Hobbles went after him. Brave, stupid, loyal Hobbles.
Ginger: I need you to go into the depths. Find Hobbles first -
Ginger: he'll know where Book Eater is.
dialog_hobbles_found: Ginger: You found Hobbles! Is he okay?
Ginger: Floor 8... the Poisoned Garden. That's where Book Eater fell.
Ginger: Go. Bring him back. Bring them both back.
dialog_complete: Ginger: Both of them. After all this time.
Ginger: Thank you. Thank you thank you thank you.

boss.name: The Verdant Blight
boss.description: The poisonous garden spirit that claimed Book Eater. It guards floor 8.
dialog: The flowers writhe and twist into a towering form.
Verdant Blight: ANOTHER ONE FOR MY GARDEN...
Verdant Blight: THE CATS WERE JUST THE BEGINNING.
Verdant Blight: YOU WILL BLOOM HERE FOREVER.

stages.description: Talk to Ginger in the overworld town to begin the quest.
Find Hobbles on floor 5. He's been searching for his brother.
Defeat the Verdant Blight on floor 8 to free the Poisoned Garden.
Find Book Eater in the Poisoned Garden after defeating the Blight.
Return to Ginger with both cats rescued.
